name: 易传说
short_description: This is a word game, challenging the system to drop equipment for gameplay, is the only way. Simplifying a lot of traditional design, players don't need complex strategies, just need to improve combat and life to solve most challenges.
detailed_description: Easy Field is a treasure hunting word game with no complicated design. Players need to challenge the system level and improve their combat power through the dropped equipment in order to continue to challenge for higher system levels. Players can manually set up the system to suit their current combat power. In battle, there is a chance to increase Combat Power by 1. If the player's health is not in the challenge, they can use currency to purchase health regeneration. Players can earn currency through the challenge system, or sell equipment.
